exampleShortHeaders.name: 3D Wall Sliding
exampleShortHeaders.shortDescription: An advanced 3D first person platformer with wall sliding, camera tween, jump pads, unstable blocks, and sprint with camera effects.
exampleShortHeaders.description:
In this template you will learn how to make:
- First person movement
- Wall slide
- Unstable blocks
- Run feature with camera effects
- Camera tween
- Jump pads

exampleShortHeaders.name: Multiplayer Platformer Arrow Fight
exampleShortHeaders.shortDescription: A local multiplayer platformer arena template where players jump, dodge, and fight with arrows.
exampleShortHeaders.description: A ready-to-use local multiplayer platformer arena template with arrow combat, player indicators, platform movement, sounds, and menu/game scenes.
